_reference: Lie, Cerebras Architecture Deep Dive: First Look Inside the Wafer Scale Engine
_notes: 7nm TSMC wafer-scale, 850,000 cores, 40GB on-chip SRAM (48KB/core), 2D mesh fabric, no off-chip DRAM, ~1GHz, 75 PFLOPS FP16

core._comment: Modeling a representative sub-array of 1024 cores as one macro-core for tractability

dram._comment: WSE-2 has no off-chip DRAM; data arrives via external host. Configured minimally for compatibility
